narrative:
Blanchard Twp. township has 866 registered voters, with 46.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.4 percentage points.
